item.title: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a
item.description: By @malpluscats: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a

item.title: The poor Starbucks employee didn’t realize the pup cup was for a cat when I ordered, so they gave him a huge cup and said he deserves it (Don’t worry. I didn’t give him the whole thing) #pupcupstarbucks #greycatsoftiktok #greycat
item.description: By @williethechaoticcat: The poor Starbucks employee didn’t realize the pup cup was for a cat when I ordered, so they gave him a huge cup and said he deserves it (Don’t worry. I didn’t give him the whole thing) #pupcupstarbucks #greycatsoftiktok #greycat

item.title: “Aggressive” Bruno’s 1-month Transformation 💫 It’s so hard to believe that this is the same cat I brought home. The first few weeks with Bruno were overwhelming. I felt hopeless at times. Even with my experience with feral & aggressive cats, Bruno has bee
item.description: By @kittyboyandfriends: “Aggressive” Bruno’s 1-month Transformation 💫 It’s so hard to believe that this is the same cat I brought home. The first few weeks with Bruno were overwhelming. I felt hopeless at times. Even with my experience with feral & aggressive cats, Bruno has bee

item.title: When she snuggles up in her robe 💙 We talked to her mom about how she started following her into the shower, and why they call it "soggy time!" Keep up with Katie and @Pym the Shower Cat

item.title: This list is probably not even half of all that i work on desensitizing them to on a daily basis 😅 I’m going to make a video with some tips soon because I’ve had a lot of people ask! 🤍 #kittens
item.description: By @malpluscats: This list is probably not even half of all that i work on desensitizing them to on a daily basis 😅 I’m going to make a video with some tips soon because I’ve had a lot of people ask! 🤍 #kittens

item.title: DON’T do these things to your cat! 😡 If you want to pet a cat, you need to be careful. Don't rush or be too rough with them; instead, approach them slowly so they feel nice and comfy! 🐈 #fyp #cat #catsoftiktok #catfacts
item.description: By @ohcharliecat: DON’T do these things to your cat! 😡 If you want to pet a cat, you need to be careful. Don't rush or be too rough with them; instead, approach them slowly so they feel nice and comfy! 🐈 #fyp #cat #catsoftiktok #catfacts
